title: Modern Furniture
description: After downloading this mod, you will be able to see in your world minecraft furniture! Which will be similar to vanilla minecraft.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d20fc5ad0b0b9258c669c0e5dc87f3f6c2cffee5.jpeg)
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dcc3cf131d59496d12701ae8c07a190c84b300a.jpeg)

------------------------------------------------------

After downloading this mod, furniture will appear in your minecraft world, which you can use for decoration. At the moment, tables and chairs of all types of wood are in fashion. Also, in future updates, electronic devices will be available. To create them in survival mode, you will have to create a portal to a special dimension.

------------------------------------------------------

### About the upcoming updates

1. I can say for sure that there will be TVs, and probably lamps and all kinds of flashlights.
2. There will be an improvement in the measurement of electricity.
3. Maybe even texture improvements.
4. With each update, the description will be changed.
5. Also, I planned to make capes on the chair.
6. And, probably, tablecloths for the tables as well.
7. They will be different colors, or rather, all the colors of wool that exist in the game.

------------------------------------------------------

### Chairs Craft
![ChairCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/068b6ed5ca971c6d7e0b96534cdfc2caad69d4eb.png)

### Tables Craft
![TableCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4784e5e812a4397f8ffdc159005acf200b573ab.png)

P.S. All types of wood are suitable for crafts.

# Dependencies

It is recommended to install OptiFine.
It is not necessary.

### Thank you in advance for the install!
